response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, and leadership scaling teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in high-stakes AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, real-time data, and microservices (Dlang, Node.js, event-driven)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and public projects
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of financial infrastructure (credit systems, working capital, compliance) or AI reliability frameworks (fallbacks, latency budgets, cost modeling)
